turns.query: Compare NO2 levels during morning rush (7-9 AM), lunch time (12-2 PM), and evening rush (6-8 PM) at roadside monitoring stations on 2025-06-10.
turns.actual_response:
On 2025-06-10, roadside monitoring stations showed the highest NO2 level during the evening rush period.

Mean NO2 levels:
- Morning rush, 7:00–9:00 AM: 38.667 µg/m³
- Lunch time, 12:00–2:00 PM: 41.033 µg/m³
- Evening rush, 6:00–8:00 PM: 47.033 µg/m³

The evening rush period had the highest NO2 concentration among the three time windows.
code_snippets:
import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# Count eligible hourly NO2 readings before aggregation
count_q = text("""
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n
FROM hourly_station_air_quality h
JOIN air_quality_station s ON h.station_id = s.id
WHERE s.station_type = 'ROADSIDE'
  AND h.datetime >= TIMESTAMP '2025-06-10 00:00:00'
  AND h.datetime <  TIMESTAMP '2025-06-11 00:00:00'
  AND h.no2 IS NOT NULL
  AND (
    (h.datetime >= TIMESTAMP '2025-06-10 07:00:00' AND h.datetime < TIMESTAMP '2025-06-10 09:00:00') OR
    (h.datetime >= TIMESTAMP '2025-06-10 12:00:00' AND h.datetime < TIMESTAMP '2025-06-10 14:00:00') OR
    (h.datetime >= TIMESTAMP '2025-06-10 18:00:00' AND h.datetime < TIMESTAMP '2025-06-10 20:00:00')
  )
""")
n_readings = int(pd.read_sql(count_q, engine)["n"].iloc[0])

agg_q = text("""
WITH labelled AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN h.datetime >= TIMESTAMP '2025-06-10 07:00:00' AND h.datetime < TIMESTAMP '2025-06-10 09:00:00' THEN 'AM'
      WHEN h.datetime >= TIMESTAMP '2025-06-10 12:00:00' AND h.datetime < TIMESTAMP '2025-06-10 14:00:00' THEN 'LUNCH'
      WHEN h.datetime >= TIMESTAMP '2025-06-10 18:00:00' AND h.datetime < TIMESTAMP '2025-06-10 20:00:00' THEN 'PM'
    END AS window,
    h.no2
  FROM hourly_station_air_quality h
  JOIN air_quality_station s ON h.station_id = s.id
  WHERE s.station_type = 'ROADSIDE'
    AND h.no2 IS NOT NULL
    AND (
      (h.datetime >= TIMESTAMP '2025-06-10 07:00:00' AND h.datetime < TIMESTAMP '2025-06-10 09:00:00') OR
      (h.datetime >= TIMESTAMP '2025-06-10 12:00:00' AND h.datetime < TIMESTAMP '2025-06-10 14:00:00') OR
      (h.datetime >= TIMESTAMP '2025-06-10 18:00:00' AND h.datetime < TIMESTAMP '2025-06-10 20:00:00')
    )
)
SELECT window, COUNT(*) AS readings, AVG(no2)::float AS mean_no2
FROM labelled
GROUP BY window
ORDER BY CASE window WHEN 'AM' THEN 1 WHEN 'LUNCH' THEN 2 WHEN 'PM' THEN 3 END
""")
summary = pd.read_sql(agg_q, engine)

vals = dict(zip(summary["window"], summary["mean_no2"]))
mean_no2_am = float(vals["AM"])
mean_no2_lunch = float(vals["LUNCH"])
mean_no2_pm = float(vals["PM"])
highest_no2_window = max(vals, key=vals.get)

print("Eligible NO2 readings counted:", n_readings)
print("Window summary:")
print(summary.assign(mean_no2=summary["mean_no2"].round(3)).to_string(index=False))
print("Stored values:", {
    "mean_no2_am": round(mean_no2_am, 3),
    "mean_no2_lunch": round(mean_no2_lunch, 3),
    "mean_no2_pm": round(mean_no2_pm, 3),
    "highest_no2_window": highest_no2_window
})

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

agg_q = text("""
WITH labelled AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN h.datetime >= TIMESTAMP '2025-06-10 07:00:00' AND h.datetime < TIMESTAMP '2025-06-10 09:00:00' THEN 'AM'
      WHEN h.datetime >= TIMESTAMP '2025-06-10 12:00:00' AND h.datetime < TIMESTAMP '2025-06-10 14:00:00' THEN 'LUNCH'
      WHEN h.datetime >= TIMESTAMP '2025-06-10 18:00:00' AND h.datetime < TIMESTAMP '2025-06-10 20:00:00' THEN 'PM'
    END AS period_label,
    h.no2
  FROM hourly_station_air_quality h
  JOIN air_quality_station s ON h.station_id = s.id
  WHERE s.station_type = 'ROADSIDE'
    AND h.no2 IS NOT NULL
    AND (
      (h.datetime >= TIMESTAMP '2025-06-10 07:00:00' AND h.datetime < TIMESTAMP '2025-06-10 09:00:00') OR
      (h.datetime >= TIMESTAMP '2025-06-10 12:00:00' AND h.datetime < TIMESTAMP '2025-06-10 14:00:00') OR
      (h.datetime >= TIMESTAMP '2025-06-10 18:00:00' AND h.datetime < TIMESTAMP '2025-06-10 20:00:00')
    )
)
SELECT period_label, COUNT(*) AS readings, AVG(no2)::float AS mean_no2
FROM labelled
GROUP BY period_label
ORDER BY CASE period_label WHEN 'AM' THEN 1 WHEN 'LUNCH' THEN 2 WHEN 'PM' THEN 3 END
""")
summary = pd.read_sql(agg_q, engine)

vals = dict(zip(summary["period_label"], summary["mean_no2"]))
mean_no2_am = float(vals["AM"])
mean_no2_lunch = float(vals["LUNCH"])
mean_no2_pm = float(vals["PM"])
highest_no2_window = max(vals, key=vals.get)

print("Eligible NO2 readings counted:", int(summary["readings"].sum()))
print("Window summary:")
print(summary.assign(mean_no2=summary["mean_no2"].round(3)).to_string(index=False))
print("Stored values:", {
    "mean_no2_am": round(mean_no2_am, 3),
    "mean_no2_lunch": round(mean_no2_lunch, 3),
    "mean_no2_pm": round(mean_no2_pm, 3),
    "highest_no2_window": highest_no2_window
})
